The '''Red Rancor''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It had red lighting for the interior and had a bad reputation. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] arranged for [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to have his bachelor party there.
